name: shadows-of-apt
description: Seed context for Shadows of the Apt series by Adrian Tchaikovsky

questions.question: Species/culture terms: how to handle Wasp-kinden, Ant-kinden, Spider-kinden, Fly-kinden, etc.?
Honorifics: keep Sieur, translate it, or use a German equivalent?
Place/geopolitical terms: especially Lowlands, Lowlander, Lowland cities.

glossary.notes: Fantasy-world geopolitical term; do not use the real-world Netherlands meaning. Ask the user for the approved rendering.
Demonym for Lowlands. German target must avoid the Dutch/Nederlander meaning.
